title: Dispensed Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: The Therapeutic Goods Administration issued Dispensed Pty Ltd six infringement notices totalling $118,800, plus a direction notice, over alleged unlawful advertising of prescription-only medicinal cannabis to consumers on third-party websites and social media, including indirect references such as 'plant medicine' and 'cannabinoid-based therapies' not permitted under the Therapeutic Goods Act 1989. Advertising restrictions on prescription-only medicines exist to prevent consumers self-selecting scheduled drugs based on promotional claims rather than clinical advice.
scope: Issued six TGA infringement notices totalling $118,800 plus a direction notice to cease conduct; Alleged advertising of a prescription-only medicine directly to consumers, contrary to the Therapeutic Goods Act 1989; Notices paid September 2025
